arts.ttl: Real Madrid dealt last-minute injury blow, just hours before Las Palmas clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid are set to host Las Palmas this afternoon at the Bernabéu in a fixture which could see them go top of the pile in La Liga. Carlo Ancelotti…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich raising Alphonso Davies’ contract offer in an effort to prevent Real Madrid from swooping in
arts.sum: In the fight to win Alphonso Davies’ signature, all cards are now on the table. Both Bayern Munich and Real Madrid have put their offers forward for the Canadian, and…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Las Palmas 2025 live stream: Time, TV channels and how to watch La Liga online
arts.sum: Real Madrid host Las Palmas in what is the first La Liga game for Los Blancos since January 3rd. Las Palmas are fighting to avoid relegation, so this should be a fairly comfortable home game for Real Madrid if they take it seriously enough.

arts.ttl: Starting Lineups: Real Madrid vs. Eibar; Liga F 2025
arts.sum: Real Madrid XI: Chavas, Olga, Lakrar, Rocío, Antonia S., Teresa, Toletti, Linda C., Eva Navarro, Redondo, Møller With Linda and Eva Navarro on the wings, Redondo and Møller lead the line as the striker duo, while the Dane is more likely to drop to the #10 role in the 4-2-3-1 formation.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Vinícius Júnior playing for Real Madrid against Las Palmas today?
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without star forward Vinícius Júnior in today’s game against Las Palmas, as the Brazilian begins a two-game LaLiga ban for his sending-off against Valencia earlier this month . The Italian is expected to play Brahim on the right wing, where the Moroccan international was also a starter in Madrid’s midweek Copa del Rey win over Celta Vigo.

arts.ttl: Why Vinicius Junior Isn't Playing for Real Madrid vs. Las Palmas
arts.sum: Vinícius Júnior is unavailable to play against Las Palmas due to his two-match suspension for his red card against Valencia.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Las Palmas, 2025 La Liga: Predicted lineups
arts.sum: Real Madrid take on Las Palmas in what should be a fairly manageable home game for Los Blancos despite their recent struggles. Real Madrid predicted XI: Courtois, Vazquez, Asencio, Rudiger, Mendy, Tchouameni, Valverde, Bellingham, Brahim, Rodrygo, Mbappe.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'considering move' for La Liga midfielder amid Aurelien Tchouameni transfer speculation
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly huge admirers of Athletic Bilbao midfielder Mikel Jauregizar and could move for him at the end of the 2024-25 campaign.

arts.ttl: Preview, Squad List, Team News: Real Madrid vs. Eibar; Liga F
arts.sum: Yasmim Ribeiro joins the squad as she awaits her Real Madrid debut. On the other side, Las Blancas sit comfortably in 2nd place with 8 points ahead of Atlético Madrid and two games in hand.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Predicted Lineup vs. Las Palmas: La Liga
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be without the suspended Vinícius Júnior when they take on Las Palmas in La Liga.
